stemHtml: When there is divergence on an uniform surface, what conditions can be anticipated at mid-latitudes?

options.a: Pressure increase and air subside, dissipation of clouds with build-up of an inversion, convergent flow in the upper troposphere.
options.b: Pressure decrease and air rise, clouds formation with precipitation, divergent now in the upper troposphere.
options.c: Pressure decrease and air rise, dissipation of clouds with build-up of an inversion, convergent flow in the upper troposphere.
options.d: Pressure increase and air subside, clouds formation with precipitation, divergent flow in the upper troposphere.
